channel.title: Herma AI Blog
channel.description: Technical deep-dives on intelligent model routing from the Herma engineering team.

item.title: How LLM Routers Work: A Technical Deep Dive
item.description: Inside the routing pipeline: query classification, model selection, shadow validation, and expected value optimization. A technical guide for AI engineers.

item.title: LLM API Gateway vs Model Router: What's the Difference?
item.description: API gateways handle plumbing. Model routers handle intelligence. Learn the difference and why modern AI apps need both — and how to get them in one integration.

item.title: How to Save 65% on AI API Costs Without Losing Quality
item.description: Most AI apps overpay by sending every query to frontier models. Learn how intelligent model routing cuts costs by 65% while maintaining quality.

item.title: LLM Routing for Agentic AI: Why Single-Turn Routers Fail
item.description: Agentic AI workflows break traditional LLM routers. Multi-turn tool use, context persistence, and error recovery demand a different routing strategy.

item.title: Best LLM Routers in 2026: A Technical Comparison
item.description: Compare the top LLM routers — RouteLLM, Martian, Unify, OpenRouter, and Herma. Evaluation criteria, architecture differences, and which router fits your use case.

item.title: Why AI Routers Fail -- And How Expected Value Fixes Them
item.description: Most AI routers treat quality as a linear tradeoff. It isn't. Here's the expected value framework that makes routing safe enough to actually use in production.

item.title: How We Benchmark AI Routers: Methodology, Pitfalls, and What We Learned
item.description: The real challenges of benchmarking a model routing system -- broken datasets, answer extraction bugs, and what we learned about classifier design.

item.title: We Benchmarked 9 Models Across 800+ Queries: The LLM Cost-Quality Matrix
item.description: Original benchmark data from 805 scored responses across 9 models. Find out which models match frontier quality at a fraction of the cost.

item.title: Shadow Routing: How to Test LLM Cost Optimization Without Risk
item.description: How to validate an LLM routing system in production without affecting users. Shadow mode, quality judging, and when to graduate to active routing.
